FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Find answers to common questions about our products, services, and ordering process.

Our baby products are certified with ASTM F833-23 (US standard for strollers), EN 1888-1:2018 (EU standard for strollers), EN 1930:2012 (EU standard for safety gates), ASTM F404-23 (US standard for high chairs), CPC (Children's Product Certificate), ISO 9001:2015 (Quality management system), and CE marking. All certifications are verifiable with test report numbers provided upon request.

Category: Product Last Updated: 2026

Our MOQ varies by product: Baby Stroller - 50 units, Safety Gate - 100 units, High Chair - 80 units, Bed Rail - 60 units. For startups and first-time orders, we can negotiate lower MOQs (as low as 30 units) with a small surcharge of 10-15%. Please contact us to discuss your specific needs.

Category: Product Last Updated: 2026

Lead times: Sample production: 3-7 days (standard products), Custom sample: 7-10 days, Mass production: 15-25 days after sample approval, Rush orders: Available with 10-15% surcharge. We provide daily production updates via WhatsApp or Email, and can share photos and videos upon request.

Category: Product Last Updated: 2026

Yes, we offer complete color customization. We have 15 standard colors available, and can match any Pantone color. For custom colors, the MOQ is 100 units per color. Color swatches are available upon request.

Category: Product Last Updated: 2026

Absolutely! We strongly recommend ordering pre-production samples first: Sample lead time: 3-7 days (standard), 7-10 days (custom). Sample cost: Typically 2x bulk price (refundable when you place an order over $5,000). Shipping cost: Paid by buyer (we can use your DHL/UPS/FEDEX account). You can test the samples for quality, fit, and function before approving bulk production. This gives you complete peace of mind before committing to a large order.

Category: Product Last Updated: 2026

ASTM F833 is the US standard consumer safety specification for carriages and strollers. It covers structural integrity and stability, brake and lock mechanisms, harness systems and restraints, entrapment protection and gap sizes, warning labels and instructions, and load testing and performance requirements. Compliance is mandatory for selling in the US, and we provide full documentation with every order.

Category: Certification Last Updated: 2026

CPC (Children's Product Certificate) is a required document for US imports of products intended for children 12 and under. A CPC must be issued by the US importer or manufacturer, include all testing lab information, list all applicable standards and regulations, and be available upon request by CPSC or US Customs. We can provide the test reports and documentation you need to issue your CPC, or guide you through the process.

Category: Certification Last Updated: 2026

Yes, we are ISO 9001:2015 certified for quality management systems. This certification covers quality control processes, documentation and record keeping, supplier management and auditing, continuous improvement processes, customer feedback handling, and risk management. Our ISO certificate is available for review upon request.

Category: Certification Last Updated: 2026

We accept T/T (Telegraphic Transfer): 30% deposit, 70% balance before shipment (most common), L/C (Letter of Credit): At sight for large orders, PayPal/Alipay: For small orders and sample payments, Alibaba Trade Assurance: For verified customers, Escrow services: For first-time customers for added security. We can discuss flexible payment terms for large ongoing orders.

Category: Purchasing Last Updated: 2026

Absolutely! We offer complete logistics support: Sea freight (FCL and LCL options), Air freight for urgent orders, Express shipping (DHL/UPS/FEDEX/TNT) for samples, Door-to-door delivery options, DDP (Delivery Duty Paid) service (to US, EU, and other major markets), Customs clearance assistance. We work with reliable forwarders and can negotiate competitive rates on your behalf.

Category: Purchasing Last Updated: 2026

We have a clear process for quality issues: Photo/video documentation first to understand the issue. If it's our defect: 100% free replacement or full refund. If minor issues: Discount or repair options. If major issues: We can arrange return or re-production at our cost. We stand behind our products 100%. Our goal is to resolve any issues quickly to your complete satisfaction.

Category: Purchasing Last Updated: 2026

Our complete sourcing service includes: Factory identification and verification (100+ pre-vetted factories in our network), Factory audit reports and background checks, Price negotiation on your behalf, Product development and customization support, QC at every production stage, Production updates with photos and videos, Shipping and logistics coordination, After-sales support and quality follow-up. We charge a 5-8% service fee depending on order size and complexity.

Category: Service Last Updated: 2026

We provide detailed production updates: Order confirmation within 24 hours, Weekly email updates (every Monday), WhatsApp notifications for important milestones, Photo updates at key production stages, Video walkthrough before shipment, QC report before shipment, Tracking information immediately available after shipping. You will have full visibility throughout the process.

Category: Service Last Updated: 2026

BabyGeo Pro was founded in 2009 in Ningbo, China. Our experience: 15+ years in baby product manufacturing and sourcing, 200+ full-time employees, 10,000+ square meters of production space, 100+ verified factories in our network, 500+ global clients served, Products exported to 30+ countries. We are proud to be a trusted partner to businesses worldwide.

Category: Company Last Updated: 2026

What sets BabyGeo Pro apart: 100% focus on baby products - it's all we do, In-house R&D and engineering team, Our own QC team (not outsourced), Factory audits before production, Real cultural bridge (our team understands both Eastern and Western business), Zero tolerance for quality issues, Full transparency throughout the process, We treat your business as our own. Our clients consistently tell us we're more professional and reliable than other suppliers they've worked with.

Category: Company Last Updated: 2026
